new_tasks.title: DSE system - exclude SBS users change request
new_tasks.description: James Salas is raising a change request to exclude specific users from the DSE (Healthy Working Plus) data extract. This relates to the post-go-live DSE data feed issues (t016) where SBS opted out of the main system but were included in the initial feed. Coordinate with Azure integrations team and James to progress this change request.

applied_updates.task_title: Web pages and URL linking -- job posting updates
applied_updates.note: Kevin clarified to Sarah Murphy that today (23 June) is the actual scheduled change day for the IM URL change, confirming critical timing.
